svg.text: COSMIC mutational signatures — six canonical SBS patterns

g.text: spontaneous 5mC deamination · clock-like, present in every tumour
trinucleotide context (96 bins) — peaks at NCG (5mC deamination)
tobacco smoking · C>A transversions in lung adenocarcinoma
UV exposure · C>T at CC/TC pyrimidine dimers (skin cancer)
CPD photoproducts at TpC and CpC dimers
HRD / BRCA-deficient · diffuse · enables PARP-inhibitor therapy
APOBEC deamination · C>G at TCW (breast / bladder)
MMR deficiency · MSI-H signature · pembrolizumab indication
